name: memory-hybrid-bridge
description: OpenClaw lifecycle plugin for hybrid memory bridge

scripts.build:ts: tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext index.ts config.ts scorer.ts extractor.ts store.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext index.ts config.ts scorer.ts extractor.ts store.ts
